events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at Werder Bremen

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen manager Xabi Alonso praised his team's determination after a commanding 5-1 win over Freiburg on Saturday, stressing the contest was more difficult than the scoreline suggested.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen's 5-1 win over Freiburg tougher than it seemed, says Alonso

video.headline: Patrik Schick bags four goals in big Bayer Leverkusen win
